sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94047" key="sidhrosfagi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σῐδηρο-σφᾰγία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n94047.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">slaying with the sword</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:128:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">128.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
